title: Big Time Ballers 2
description: Big Time Ballers 2 is a Modpack made custom for me & my friends' Minecraft server! It is building & shenanigans focused.
body:
# Welcome to Big Time Ballers!
Big Time Ballers is a personal server I run for my online friends and their friends. This modpack is focused primarily on _building & creative expression_ in Minecraft. There is very little to no extra vertical progression on top!

## Big Mod: Create
Create is the biggest mod in the modpack, with a special selection of addons to allow for the best use of trains! There aren't waystone mods, so make best use of **Steam & Rails**, **Railways Navigator**, and **Pattern Schematics** to build networks of automated trains around the world!

## Big Mod: Farmer's Delight & Bountiful Fares
Farmer's Delight is a classic and engaging mod, with the addition of Bountiful Fares meant to round out the world of cooking & food!

## The Worldgen
For the worldgen, the big 3 are Surface, Nature's Spirit, and Lithosphere. Surface overhauls the vanilla biomes with new mechanics, blocks, mobs, and generation. Nature's Spirit is a realistic and vanilla-like biome mod that adds around a dozen wood types, adding heavy variation to building!


# There's a lot more than what I just listed, so give this mod a try with your friends!
If you want a server host, go look around, I'm not sponsored. If you however are a server host, I am looking kindly your way with a sparkle in my eyes.
